content.raw:
AI keynotes, workshops, and culture-shifting rooms

AI Keynote Speaker Kris Krüg

I help people stop treating AI like a software rollout and start treating it like a cultural shift. My talks mix live demos, field stories, creative rebellion, practical workflows, and the hard questions about power, taste, trust, memory, and what we refuse to automate.

Book Kris for a keynote Explore keynote portals
  • World AI Film Festival
  • CreativeMornings Vancouver
  • Whistler Institute
  • Social Media Camp
  • TEDx Shanghai
  • SXSW Interactive
  • UN Global Youth Summit

Bring me in when the room needs courage, clarity, and a little voltage.

I speak to leaders, creators, students, associations, cultural organizations, and community builders who know AI is already changing the ground under their feet. The goal is not hype. The goal is useful imagination: better questions, stronger instincts, practical experiments, and a shared language people can actually carry back to work.

My sweet spot is the space between creative practice, civic responsibility, community organizing, and hands-on AI adoption.

Common formats

  • 45-60 minute keynote
  • Keynote plus moderated Q&A
  • Half-day AI mindset workshop
  • Executive or board briefing
  • Creative team working session

Signature keynote topics

Both Hands Full

For filmmakers, artists, and leaders trying to stay human while AI gets very good at making everything.

Visit the portal

Punk Rock AI / Creative Rebellion

Agency, taste, sovereignty, and making culture with the tools without surrendering the weird human parts.

Visit the portal

Developing an AI Mindset

A practical keynote/workshop for teams that need confidence, shared language, and curiosity.

Visit the portal

Compost AI

Turn archives, stories, decisions, and relationships into sovereign creative soil instead of extractive data exhaust.

Ask about this talk

Leadership After the AI Point of No Return

For organizations that need to ship useful experiments while holding the line on trust, safety, and consent.

Ask about this talk

Power, Taste, and Trust

How human judgment stays visible when AI becomes the layer nobody notices but everyone depends on.

Ask about this talk

Keynote portals

Some talks become more than a stage slot. I rebuild them as standalone websites with scripts, exercises, resources, prompts, and tools people can use after the room empties.

Both Hands Full

World AI Film Festival edition for filmmakers working through synthetic media, authorship, taste, and responsibility.

Punk Rock AI

A CreativeMornings Vancouver keynote rebuilt as a maker-first portal for human agency in the AI age.

Developing an AI Mindset

A foundational AI adoption resource for teams that need practical language and a humane starting point.

What audiences get

Live demos with a point

Not tool theatre. Demos are there to make the strategy, ethics, and creative practice tangible.

Language people can reuse

Frameworks and phrases that help teams talk about AI without hiding behind hype or panic.

Creative courage

Permission to experiment while still protecting taste, relationships, consent, and human responsibility.

Speaker proof

Kris helped shift how my design students see their future. In one hour, he demo'd building client prototypes in real-time, turned lectures into podcasts, and showed them how to be design orchestrators, not pixel pushers.

Jai Djwa

Kris's talk and event design felt like a masterclass in community organizing.

Ed Kennedy

Visceral, real, and incredibly current. Truly authentic and up to date.

Audience feedback

Past stages and rooms

  • World AI Film Festival, Sao Paulo
  • CreativeMornings Vancouver
  • Whistler Institute
  • BC + AI Ecosystem events
  • Social Media Camp Victoria
  • TEDx Shanghai
  • South by Southwest Interactive
  • UN Global Youth Summit on HIV
  • Emily Carr University
  • Vancouver Institute of Media Arts
  • WebVisions
  • Gnomedex
  • PechaKucha Night Vancouver
  • Hollyhock Summer Gathering
  • Private executive AI sessions

Book Kris for a keynote

If your audience needs a talk that is practical, alive, culturally literate, and allergic to boring AI sludge, let's talk. I can tailor a keynote or workshop for creative teams, leadership audiences, associations, festivals, schools, and community networks.

Start a booking conversation See current work

meta.advanced_seo_description: Book Kris Krüg for keynotes on AI, creativity, community, and responsible technology. Talks include Both Hands Full, Punk Rock AI, Developing an AI Mindset, and Compost AI.
meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: AI Keynote Speaker Kris Krüg | Humanizing AI, Creativity & Community

jetpack-related-posts.title: Work
jetpack-related-posts.author: Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Current work, living systems, and useful experiments Work I build community infrastructure, AI learning systems, keynote portals, and cultural field notes for people trying to meet the future without losing the plot. The throughline is simple: humanize technology, make creative work more alive, and turn networks into things people can…

jetpack-related-posts.title: About Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.author: Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: My name is Kris Krug – a boundary-pushing Creative Explorer, an intuitive Tech Whisperer, and a tenacious Culture Hacker. In the fabric of the digital era, where technology often overshadows humanity, I've taken it upon myself to chart a different course. I’m on a relentless mission to humanize technology, to…
